hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; msgs=''; case "$f" in */src/lib/services/*|*/src/lib/db/*) msgs="code-reviewer, test-writer" ;; */extension/*) msgs="code-reviewer, chrome-extension-agent" ;; */src/app/api/*) msgs="security-auditor, code-reviewer" ;; */src/lib/parsers/*) msgs="parser-qa, data-integrity-agent" ;; */src/components/charts/*|*/src/components/analytics/*) msgs="design-language, responsive-qa" ;; */src/components/*|*/src/app/*/page.tsx) msgs="design-language, dark-mode-auditor, responsive-qa" ;; */migrations/*) msgs="data-integrity-agent, schema-navigator" ;; */scripts/*) msgs="data-integrity-agent" ;; esac; [ -n "$msgs" ] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"AGENT QUEUE: File modified ($f). After you finish the current implementation, you MUST run these agents in order: $msgs. Run them in parallel where independent. Do NOT skip — this is mandatory.\"}}" ; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *rebuild-pipeline*|*reimport*|*step2*|*step3*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AGENT QUEUE: Pipeline was rebuilt. You MUST run: data-integrity-agent, financial-auditor. Do NOT skip."}}' ;; *vitest*|*jest*|*test*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AGENT QUEUE: Tests were run. If any failed, run regression-tester to check for broader breakage."}}' ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.agent_name // .subagent_type // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null | { read -r agent; chain=''; case "$agent" in backend-developer) chain='code-reviewer, test-writer' ;; frontend-developer) chain='responsive-qa, design-language, ui-ux-reviewer, dark-mode-auditor' ;; frontend-layout) chain='dark-mode-auditor, responsive-qa' ;; frontend-interaction) chain='code-reviewer, e2e-verification' ;; api-route-generator) chain='code-reviewer, security-auditor' ;; chart-analytics-builder) chain='responsive-qa, design-language' ;; chrome-extension-agent) chain='code-reviewer' ;; integration-specialist) chain='data-integrity-agent, test-writer' ;; migration-writer) chain='data-integrity-agent, schema-navigator' ;; parser-developer) chain='parser-qa, data-integrity-agent' ;; platform-data-agent) chain='data-integrity-agent, code-reviewer' ;; code-reviewer) chain='e2e-verification' ;; security-auditor) chain='' ;; esac; if [ -n "$chain" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SubagentStop\",\"additionalContext\":\"AGENT CHAIN (MANDATORY): $agent completed. You MUST now run these follow-up agents: $chain. Run them in parallel where independent. Then: 1) Update memory: append findings to .claude/memory/$agent.md. 2) If the agent modified files, verify changes work. Do NOT skip chaining — this is how quality is maintained.\"}}"; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SubagentStop\",\"additionalContext\":\"AGENT COMPLETE: $agent finished. 1) Update memory: append findings to .claude/memory/$agent.md. 2) If the agent modified files, verify changes work.\"}}"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SESSION START CHECKLIST: 1) Read .claude/memory/_shared.md for cross-cutting project rules. 2) Read CLAUDE.md for project architecture and conventions. 3) Check docs/design-system.md if you will be doing any UI work. 4) You have 32 agents available — use them. Key agents: orchestrator (plan first), code-reviewer (after code changes), design-language (after UI changes), data-integrity-agent (after pipeline changes), e2e-verification (after any feature), financial-auditor (after money-related changes). 5) NEVER context-switch mid-task. Finish, verify, then move on. 6) NEVER guess at external APIs — use external-docs-researcher first."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"VERIFICATION CHECKPOINT: Before responding to ANY new user request, you MUST verify the last task is complete: 1) Take a screenshot or run a query to PROVE the change works. 2) Check for data integrity if pipeline was touched. 3) Only THEN move to the next task. If the user sent a new message mid-task, finish and verify the current task FIRST, tell the user what you completed, THEN address their new message. NEVER context-switch mid-implementation."}}'

cd /Users/alan/Documents/claude/profitduck && changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); agents=''; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'src/app/api/|src/lib/services/|src/app/.*/page\.tsx|extension/' && agents="$agents documentation-keeper"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.tsx$' && agents="$agents e2e-verification"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'src/lib/services/.*money\|src/lib/services/.*fee\|src/lib/services/.*pipeline\|src/app/api/.*tax\|src/app/api/.*reconcil' && agents="$agents financial-auditor"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'src/lib/services/pipeline\|src/lib/parsers/' && agents="$agents data-integrity-agent"; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'src/lib/services/.*square\|src/lib/services/.*plaid\|src/app/api/.*square\|src/app/api/.*plaid' && agents="$agents integration-specialist"; [ -n "$agents" ] && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"Stop\",\"additionalContext\":\"END-OF-TASK AGENTS (MANDATORY): Based on changed files, you MUST run these agents before moving on:$agents. Run in background if needed. Do NOT skip.\"}}" || true
